name: future-stone
description: Future Stone: LifeOS decision simulation agent for possible timelines.

scripts.dev:api: cd services/backend-api && uv run python -m app.main
scripts.test:api: cd services/backend-api && uv run --extra dev pytest -q
scripts.lint:api: cd services/backend-api && uv run --extra dev ruff check .
scripts.verify: pnpm test:api && pnpm lint:api && pnpm build:web
